calendar.matters:
Petition To Determine Ownership Of Trust Property, For Specific Performance Of Executory Contract Of Sale Of Trust Property And For Order Authorizing
Off Calendar Oct-04-2021 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Nicholas Ma, via ZOOM, for Dames Shouman, Objector; Jonathan Madison, via ZOOM, for Tony Hua, Petitioner.

The court begins by asking Mr. Madison for clarification of his request to temporarily take this matter off calendar. Mr. Madison advises that the decedent's granddaughter had accepted service on a civil action as trustee of a "mystery" trust. The court advises that it appears as though this probate matter is second in line to the civil action and advises that this matter will be taken off calendar. No objections to the court's tentative ruling are presented.

The Petition to Determine Ownership, etc., is taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.
